# Module API Index

[README](../../../README.md) -> [API Index](../INDEX.md) -> [Modules Index](./INDEX.md)

## Modules

- [CHAIN.md](./CHAIN.md) - chain expression parser/runner (`lib.ui.chain`)
- [SET_ALERT.md](./SET_ALERT.md) - grouped alert helper (`lib.ui.design.v1.setAlert`)
- [TOASTER.md](./TOASTER.md) - alert/toast setter (`lib.ui.toaster`)
- [COLLAPSE.md](./COLLAPSE.md) - collapse service (`ui.collapse`)
- [TABS.md](./TABS.md) - tabs service (`ui.tabs`)
- [DIALOG.md](./DIALOG.md) - dialog service (`ui.dialog`)
- [PROXY.md](./PROXY.md) - proxy service (`ui.proxy`)
- [NAVBAR.md](./NAVBAR.md) - navbar service (`ui.navbar`)
- [SERVICE.md](./SERVICE.md) - service class defs + ids mapping
